title: tristellateia bojeriana
intro: Tristellateia bojeriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the "Madagascar beauty" due to its attractive white and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. Tristellateia bojeriana is often prepared as a herbal infusion, tincture, or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
